description: A love-forever classic, this murcia sling bag is a closet essential. Perfect for colour blocking and mix-and-match ensembles, make this piece your go-to essential to add a fresh twist to off-duty staples. Height: 28 cm Width: 40 cm Soft, supple leather upper Fabric lining One main zippered compartment with a pouch and a zippered pocket Two shoulder straps Care Do not machine wash Rub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirt
